/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=13.5 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SDL_test.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o SDL_test   -L/Users/kionmiyasaka/Documents/projects/SDL_Test/SDL_Test/src/main.cpp
